creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
On my computer (FreeBSD 8.1-RELEASE), cyrus-sasl fails to detect the
required GSSAPI/KRB5 libraries, and does not build the required gssapi
libraries. However, these are listed in the packaging list, thus
breaking uninstalls in portmaster, and breaking packaging. I tried
make KRB5_HOME=/usr, and with KRB5_HOME unset, and with
HEIMDAL_HOME=/usr, without success.

Packaging errors:
Creating bzip'd tar ball in '/usr/ports/packages/All/cyrus-sasl-2.1.23.tbz'
tar: lib/sasl2/libgssapiv2.a: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/sasl2/libgssapiv2.la: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/sasl2/libgssapiv2.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/sasl2/libgssapiv2.so.2: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256


Find below a patch that does UNRELATED cleanups for KRB4 and misc.
warning patches, and log information on the GSSAPI issue.

This is the relevant information from the file system:

$ find /lib /usr/lib /usr/local/lib -maxdepth 1 \( -name '*krb*' \
    -o -name '*gss*' \) -print | sort
/usr/lib/libgssapi.a
/usr/lib/libgssapi.so
/usr/lib/libgssapi.so.10
/usr/lib/libgssapi_krb5.a
/usr/lib/libgssapi_krb5.so
/usr/lib/libgssapi_krb5.so.10
/usr/lib/libgssapi_ntlm.a
/usr/lib/libgssapi_ntlm.so
/usr/lib/libgssapi_ntlm.so.10
/usr/lib/libgssapi_spnego.a
/usr/lib/libgssapi_spnego.so
/usr/lib/libgssapi_spnego.so.10
/usr/lib/libkrb5.a
/usr/lib/libkrb5.so
/usr/lib/libkrb5.so.10
/usr/lib/librpcsec_gss.a
/usr/lib/librpcsec_gss.so
/usr/lib/librpcsec_gss.so.1
/usr/lib/pam_krb5.so
/usr/lib/pam_krb5.so.5

This is the config.log.gz in "uuencode -m" format:
